data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing CPQ product's details including pricing, attributes, and configuration. Requires the product ID in the path. Changes are immediately reflected in the system.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a CPQ product from the system by its ID. Requires the product ID as a path parameter. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. This action cannot be undone. Deleting a product may affect existing deals or quotes that reference it.
